moduleTitle: NDT Methods Familiarity: Ultrasonic and Thermal/Infrared Testing

lessons.title: Ultrasonic Testing: Wave Propagation and Transducers
objectives: Describe sound fields and wave travel modes in materials
Explain refraction, reflection, scattering, and attenuation of ultrasound
Describe transducers and sound beam coupling

lessons.title: Ultrasonic Testing: Equipment, Standards, Interpretation, and Applications
objectives: Identify basic types of UT equipment and reference standards
Interpret representative UT discontinuity indications and system factors at a familiarity level
Describe UT applications including flaw detection, thickness measurement, bond evaluation, process control, castings, and weldments

lessons.title: Thermal/Infrared Testing: Fundamentals and Equipment
objectives: Explain principles and theory of infrared testing and temperature measurement
Describe proper selection of IR technique
Identify IR equipment from contact indicators to thermal imagers

lessons.title: Thermal/Infrared Testing: Applications and Evaluation
objectives: Describe exothermic/endothermic, friction, fluid flow, thermal resistance, and thermal capacitance investigations
Summarize interpretation and evaluation of IR results at a familiarity level
